# SynxisNom Trigger Keywords

## Skill Activation

- synxisnom
- nomenclature
- app id
- application code
- domain code
- naming convention
- service tier
- service type
- hss-
- ari-
- prc-
- sv-
- ui-
- gd-
- chc-
- frontman
- controlcenter
- cockpit
- edgeapi

- partnermanagerservice

- travelport dcx
- amadeus dcx

## Route Keywords

- Overview route:
  - domains, tech stack, naming format, app count, tier label, service tier
- App lookup route:
  - what is HSS-, what is ARI-, what is PRC-, what is frontman, what is controlcenter, what is OES, service type, app meaning, service description, alias
- Solution route:
  - which solution, .sln, namespace, project path, source root, jenkinsfile, cake, publish task

## Guard Keywords (route away)

- checklist, coding standard, review guideline -> reviewnet skill
- tax, taxes, taxrule, taxcalculator -> tax skill
- eventhandler, neweventtype, apiintegration, dtomapping, ohip validate -> ohip skill
- architect, archon, ad2, adr, son, srd -> architect skill
